title: ICAR IARI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Young Professional II Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website of ICAR IARI. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR IARI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Men: Maximum 35 years Women: Maximum 40 years Age relaxation: As per Government of India / ICAR rules for SC/ST/OBC

qualification.details: M.Sc. in Agricultural Extension M.Sc. in Agricultural Economics M.Sc. in Agronomy M.Sc. in Horticulture M.Sc. in Community Science (Extension) M.Sc. in Computer Application

selection_process: Screening of emailed applications Verification of original certificates Personal interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to email your application and declaration for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-II recruitment is 01-06-2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional-II post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. ₹ 42,000/-. This is a consolidated amount for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Agricultural Extension, Agricultural Economics, Agronomy, Horticulture, Community Science (Extension), or Computer Application to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for male candidates is 35 years. For female candidates, the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Young Professional-II posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of emailed applications, followed by verification of original certificates and a personal interview. Candidates must perform well in all stages.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the ICAR IARI Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II positions is scheduled to be held on 08-06-2026. Candidates should be prepared to attend the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the email application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
